task.gpu_name: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition

deploy.gpu: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition

system.gpu_name: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition

compose:
services:

  vllm_0:
    image: vllm/vllm-openai:latest
    container_name: vllm_0
    deploy:
      resources:
        reservations:
          devices:
            - driver: nvidia
              count: all
              capabilities: [gpu]
    volumes:
      - /hf_models:/hf_models
    environment:
      - HUGGING_FACE_HUB_TOKEN=***
      - HF_HOME=/hf_models
    ports:
      - "8000:8000"
    shm_size: '16gb'
    ipc: host
    command: >
      --trust-remote-code
      --gpu-memory-utilization=0.9
      --host 0.0.0.0
      --port 8000
      --tensor-parallel-size 1
      --pipeline-parallel-size 1
      --model Qwen/Qwen3-Coder-Next-FP8
      --served-model-name Qwen/Qwen3-Coder-Next-FP8
      --max-model-len 262144
      --max-num-seqs 28
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "bash", "-c", "curl -f http://localhost:8000/health"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 180
      start_period: 600s
